name: Rice Crust for Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the rice with eggs and cheese.
2. Press mixture into 10-inch pizza pan.
3. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes.
4. Place sauce and toppings of your choice on the crust.
5. Bake an additional 10 minutes.
PROTEIN: 45.4 grams; CALORIES: 1066
These are all from the Whole Foods For The Whole Family Cookbook.
